channel.title: JapaneseGarden on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in JapaneseGarden on Nature Works

item.title: The Japanese Forest Garden
item.description:
My client in Poland wants a Japanese-style garden incorporated into the forest garden, so I made a special trip to meet the staff responsible for the Japanese Garden at Botanic Garden Wales

At first glance, the idea of a Japanese Garden is at odds with a forest garden: clipped cloud hedges, carefully trained trees, layer upon layer of symbolism and meaning. http://localhost:1313/blog/japanese-forest-garden/
